caption: A person's right hand and forearm are shown playing an acoustic guitar. The person is wearing a dark-colored long-sleeved garment. The hand is positioned over the guitar's strings, with the thumb pressing down on a string near the fretboard. The guitar has a light-colored wooden body and a dark fretboard with metallic frets. Across the bottom of the scene, a blue graphic banner displays the text "Basil Chapman" in a large font, with a smaller line underneath reading "The Tiger Technicians Hour | June 8th, 2022". As the sequence progresses, the hand shifts slightly, continuing to press and pluck the guitar strings, while the camera remains in a close-up, static position. The focus remains tight on the interaction between the fingers and the instrument, with the background blurred.
